name: Fix off-by-one error in array indexing
description: The getLastItem function uses length instead of length-1
task: Fix the bug in /project/src/utils.ts -- the getLastItem function has an off-by-one error. It accesses arr[arr.length] which is out of bounds.

turns.text: Fixed the off-by-one error. Changed `arr[arr.length]` to `arr[arr.length - 1]`.
